application_rationale: The chosen idea works because the audience has a specific immediate problem: they are stressed and short on time before a meeting. Hook Problem Solution turns that pressure into a fast relief arc.

applied_beats.idea_application: Luna names the two-minute pre-meeting constraint beside the laptop.
applied_beats.viewer_question_answered: Is this for my situation right now?

applied_beats.idea_application: The laptop clock and tense shoulders show the viewer has no time for a full workout.
Luna demonstrates three standing movements that fit beside the desk.
Luna returns to the laptop visibly calmer and more upright.
applied_beats.viewer_question_answered: What do I get from trying this?
